---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you would like.

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Why do you need this feature?

## Proposed Solution

How you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have tried.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, screenshots, or examples.
